steps.title: Translate 7% growth into a multiplier
steps.content: Growth by 7% means multiplying by (100% + 7%) = 107% = 1.07 each month. Do not use 0.07 (which represents keeping only 7%, not adding 7%) or 1.7 (which represents 70% growth).

steps.title: Write the exponential equation
steps.content:
Exponential growth repeats the same multiplier each period. After $m$ months of applying the multiplier 1.07:
$$c = 1,300 \times (1.07)^m$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
